===''Pokémon the Series''===
====''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]''====
Hop was briefly mentioned by [[Sonia]], although not by name, in ''[[JN100|Meeting Up with the Monarch!]]''.

Hop debuted in ''[[JN115|Curtain Up! Fight the Fights!]]'', where he met {{Ash}} and [[Goh]] outside [[Wyndon Stadium]] and challenged Ash to a battle. He used his {{p|Wooloo}} to battle against {{AP|Pikachu}}, only for it to be instantly defeated. When the [[Masters Eight Tournament]] started, Hop joined Goh in the audience to watch the battles with him. He continued to serve the same role during the following Masters Eight Tournament battles, although, during the finals, he was instead joined by [[Sonia]], as Goh had been forced to leave for a [[Project Mew]] mission.

In ''[[JN136|This Could be the Start of Something Big!]]'', Hop was shown having a training battle against [[Bea]], using Wooloo to battle against her {{p|Machamp}} while Leon observed the match.

====Pokémon====

|pkmn=Wooloo

|desc={{p|Wooloo}} is Hop's only known Pokémon and is usually seen [[Walking Pokémon|outside of its Poké Ball]]. It was used to battle {{Ash}}, only to be easily defeated by {{AP|Pikachu}} in a single [[move]]. It later joined him in watching the [[Masters Eight Tournament]] battles.

In ''[[JN136|This Could be the Start of Something Big!]]'', Hop used Wooloo in a training battle against [[Bea]], where it went up against her {{p|Machamp}}.

Wooloo's known moves are {{m|Double Kick}}{{tt|*|Mentioned only}} and {{m|Thunder Wave}}.}}
